# HUMMBL Bibliography — llms.txt
# AI-readable index of the HUMMBL research bibliography.
# 460 entries across 19 tiers. Last updated: 2026-07-21.
#
# Query API: node toolkit/src/query.js --keyword HUMMBL:BKI --format json
# Direct DOI access: https://doi.org/{doi}
#
